authority.department: Labour & Employment Department, Administration of the Union Territory of Ladakh

overview: Union Territory-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Ladakh.

rules.title: Review Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the applicable Shops and Establishments legislation is required.

citations.reference: Applicable Ladakh Shops and Establishments legislation

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and prescribed notices under applicable labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices and employee information required under applicable labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays applicable in Ladakh.

citations.reference: Applicable Ladakh Shops and Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest minimum wage notifications applicable in Ladakh.

rules.title: Monitor Union Territory Labour Notifications
rules.description: Review labour department notifications, circulars and amendments issued by the Union Territory Administration.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering registrations, payroll compliance, statutory records and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital compliance calendar for statutory filings, inspections, licence renewals and compliance due dates.
